hooks.command: echo 'b-agentic checklist: read the cited contract section before edit/external/mutate.'

statusLine.command:
input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // empty'); project_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir // empty'); repo_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.repo.name // empty'); total_input=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); window_size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0'); R='\033[0m'; B='\033[1m'; C='\033[36m'; G='\033[32m'; Y='\033[33m'; R2='\033[31m'; M='\033[35m'; W='\033[37m'; DIM='\033[2m'; if [ -n "$repo_name" ] && [ "$repo_name" != 'null' ]; then project="$repo_name"; elif [ -n "$project_dir" ] && [ "$project_dir" != 'null' ]; then project=$(basename "$project_dir"); elif [ -n "$dir" ] && [ "$dir" != 'null' ]; then project=$(basename "$dir"); else project=''; fi; branch=''; dirty=''; if [ -n "$dir" ] && [ "$dir" != 'null' ] && git -C "$dir" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$dir" -c core.fsmonitor=false symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$dir" -c core.fsmonitor=false rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then gs=$(git -C "$dir" -c core.fsmonitor=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -c 1); [ -n "$gs" ] && dirty='*'; fi; fi; bar=''; pct_int=0; if [ -n "$used_pct" ] && [ "$used_pct" != 'null' ]; then pct_int=$(echo "$used_pct" | cut -d. -f1); [ -z "$pct_int" ] && pct_int=0; f=$(( pct_int * 10 / 100 )); [ "$f" -gt 10 ] && f=10; e=$(( 10 - f )); i=0; while [ $i -lt $f ]; do bar="${bar}▓"; i=$((i+1)); done; i=0; while [ $i -lt $e ]; do bar="${bar}░"; i=$((i+1)); done; if [ "$pct_int" -lt 50 ]; then bc=$G; elif [ "$pct_int" -lt 80 ]; then bc=$Y; else bc=$R2; fi; tt=$(( total_input + total_output )); ft=$(printf '%''d
' "$tt" 2>/dev/null || echo "$tt"); fm=$(printf '%''d
' "$window_size" 2>/dev/null || echo "$window_size"); cs="${bc}${bar}${R} ${pct_int}% ${DIM}(${ft} / ${fm})${R}"; else cs="${DIM}no context yet${R}"; fi; out=''; [ -n "$model" ] && out="${out}${C}${B}${model}${R}"; [ -n "$out" ] && out="${out} ${DIM}│${R} "; out="${out}${cs}"; if [ -n "$project" ]; then [ -n "$out" ] && out="${out} ${DIM}│${R} "; out="${out}${M}${B}${project}${R}"; fi; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then [ -n "$out" ] && out="${out} ${DIM}│${R} "; out="${out}${G}⎇ ${branch}${R2}${dirty}${R}"; fi; printf '%b
' "$out"
